smsCaptureSubtitle: Import MTN MoMo & Airtel Money automatically
smsCaptureDescription: When enabled, MobiFlow will automatically add transactions when you receive or send mobile money via MTN MoMo or Airtel Money. You must grant SMS permission.
smsCaptureForegroundNote: A notification will appear so capture continues when the app is in the background.
scanPastCompleteAdded: Added {{count}} transaction(s) from past mobile money messages.
scanPastCompleteNone: No new mobile money transactions found in past messages.
scanPastError: Failed to scan past messages. Make sure SMS permission is granted.
smsCaptureHint: This feature works on Android only. Build with 'npx expo run:android' to test on a real device. Expo Go does not support SMS capture.
smsCaptureAndroidOnly: Auto-capture SMS is only available on Android. Build the app with 'npx expo run:android' to use this feature on a real device.
faqAddTransactionQ: How do I add a transaction?
faqAddTransactionA: Tap the + button on the Home or Transactions screen. Enter the description, amount, and category.
faqChangePasswordQ: How do I change my password?
faqChangePasswordA: In-app password change is coming soon. For now, use Forgot password on the login screen to reset, or contact support.
faqDataSecureA: Yes. We use Firebase for secure authentication and Firestore for encrypted data storage. Your financial data is private and only used to provide MobiFlow features (reports, insights, alerts). We do not sell your data or share it with third parties for marketing.
faqSmsCaptureA: When auto-capture is on, MobiFlow reads MTN MoMo and Airtel Money SMS on your phone to detect transfers and payments. We only scan mobile money messages and convert them into transactions in your account. You can turn auto-capture off in Settings or revoke SMS permission in your device settings.
faqAnomalyA: MobiFlow compares each transaction to your past history. If an amount is much larger than your normal income or expense, we label it 'Bigger than usual' to remind you to double-check it. It does not mean something is wrong, only that it is larger than your usual pattern.
faqBackupQ: How do I back up or restore my data?
faqBackupA: From the Data & storage screen in Settings you can export your transactions and reports, or back up and restore from cloud. This helps you keep a copy of your data or move it to a new phone.

aboutDescription:
MobiFlow is a simple finance app built for informal small and medium enterprises in Rwanda. It connects to your MTN MoMo and Airtel Money SMS so you don’t have to type every transaction by hand.

MobiFlow helps you see the full picture of your business money – automatic capture of mobile money SMS plus manual income and expense entry; understand where money is going with clear reports, category breakdowns and trends over time; spot bigger-than-usual transactions so you can double-check them; and stay on top of budgets and savings goals.

Our objective is to help informal SMEs build better financial records and confidence, so they can make decisions faster and be more ready for credit or investment.

onboardingHeadline: Smart mobile money tracking for your business.
onboardingBody: MobiFlow converts MTN MoMo and Airtel Money SMS into clear financial insights. Monitor sales, track expenses, and understand your cash flow all in one place.
agreeToTermsAndPrivacy: I agree to the Terms of service and Privacy policy
bySigningInYouAgree: By signing in you agree to our Terms of service and Privacy policy.
bySigningInYouAgreePrefix: By signing in you agree to our
termsSubtitle: Simple summary of what you agree to
termsIntro: By using MobiFlow you agree to the following. We keep this short so you can understand.
termsUseOfAppBody: You use MobiFlow to track your business income and expenses. You are responsible for keeping your account secure and for the accuracy of the data you enter.
termsYourDataBody: Your transaction data is stored securely. We do not sell your data. We use it only to provide the app (e.g. reports, insights). You can export or delete your data from Settings.
termsAcceptableUseBody: You will not use the app for illegal activity or to harm others. We may suspend or close accounts that break these rules.
termsContact: Questions? Contact us through the app (Help & support) or by email at the address shown in About.
dashboardPeriodHint: Balance and totals for selected period
trackIncomeExpenses: Track income and expenses with mobile money
defaultCategoriesHint: Supplies, Transport, Utilities, Rent, Salaries, Other
scoreMessageConsider: Consider cutting expenses or increasing income.
scoreMessageNoData: Add at least 3 transactions to see your business health score.
creditworthinessDisclaimer: Based on your report data only. This is not a credit score from a bank. Lenders make the final decision.
creditworthinessReasonInsufficientData: Add at least 7 days of transactions and some income in the period to get an assessment.
creditworthinessReasonNegativeCashFlow: Expenses exceed income in this period.
creditworthinessReasonNoSavings: Income covers expenses but there is no savings buffer.
creditworthinessReasonLowSavings: Savings rate is below 10%. Lenders often look for a buffer.
creditworthinessReasonPositiveFlow: Income meets or exceeds expenses in the period.
creditworthinessReasonSavingsRate: Positive savings rate shows capacity to repay.
noCategoryBudgetsComingSoon: No category budgets set. Coming soon.
suggestedBudgetsSubtitle: Based on your spending. Budget = avg spend × 1.1
deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Transactions using it will show as "Other" in reports.
businessHealthTipsIntro: Simple steps to help your business grow. Tap the buttons below to do them now.
tipTrackIncomeBody: When money comes in or goes out, add it here. The app remembers everything for you.
tipTrackIncomeBenefit: You will always know how much money you have
tipBuildReserveBody: Try to save enough money to cover 3 months of your usual spending. This helps when business is slow.
tipBuildReserveBenefit: You will have money when you need it most
tipSeparateSpending: Keep home money and business money separate
tipSeparateSpendingBody: When you add a transaction, choose if it's for your home or your business. Use different categories.
tipSeparateSpendingBenefit: You will see clearly how your business is doing
tipLowBalanceAlerts: Get warned when money is low
tipLowBalanceAlertsBody: Turn on alerts. The app will tell you when your money is getting low, before it reaches zero.
tipLowBalanceAlertsBenefit: You will know before you run out of money
tipReviewReports: Check your money report every month
tipReviewReportsBody: Look at your Reports screen once a month. See where your money went and plan what to do next.
tipReviewReportsBenefit: You will make better decisions about your money
tipImproveCashFlow: Get paid faster, pay bills on time
tipImproveCashFlowBody: Ask customers to pay you quickly. Pay your bills when they are due. Keep some extra money for slow months.

howToUseIntro: Follow these steps to get the most out of MobiFlow. You can also use this guide to make a tutorial video.
tutorialStep1Body: Open the app, tap Sign Up, and register with your phone number and a password. You will use this to log in and keep your data safe.
tutorialStep2Body: After login, the Home tab shows your balance, income and expenses for the period you choose (today, week, month). Tap the period pills to change the view.
tutorialStep3Body: Tap the yellow + button on Home or Transactions to add income or expense. Enter description, amount, category, and payment method (cash or mobile money).
tutorialStep4Body: Go to More → Settings → Auto-capture mobile money SMS. Turn it on and allow SMS permission. MobiFlow will then import MTN MoMo and Airtel Money transactions automatically.
tutorialStep5Body: Open the Reports tab to see spending by category, income vs expense, and Top Customers. Use filters and download PDF or CSV if needed.
tutorialStep6Body: From the More tab you can manage categories, set savings goals, check business health, and watch financial literacy videos.
financialLiteracySubtitle: Short videos about saving, credit, and money
financialLiteracyIntro: Watch short Kinyarwanda videos about saving, credit, and managing business money.
financialLiteracyVideoHint: Tap to watch this lesson inside the app.
